titleStmt.title: SII 6.112: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 112. (A.R. No. 154 of 1897). ON A SLAB USED AS A MORTAR IN THE HOUSE OF THE PUJARI OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
danakhiḷa viśvaṁbhareyōḷ . vṛ
raḷkipeḷu peḷasutirppinegaṁ nijakōpapāvakajvāḷegaḷinde suṭṭu maleyēḷumanramadiṁde kū
ḍe nirmmūḷisi kīrttiyaṁ taḷadanalte mahēśvaradaṇḍanāyakaṁ . Ā vibhuvina vallabhe bhūdēvi vacōdēvi
lakṣmīdēviyenalu peṁpāvagamamarddire paṁpādēvi pogartteya negartteyaṁ taḷedirddaḷ .
Ā vadhuvuṁ varanuṁ nānāvidhadiṁ nōntu vaiṣṇavārādhaneyaṁ tāvosedu māḍi paḍedar śrī
varanene negarddanantadaṇḍādhipana . rāyatuḷappavallabhana naccinabīlu kharacakranugra khaḷgāyu
dhavārddutūrddiḍuva kakkaḍeyirppa volirdda parjjeyaśrīyumanāyumaṁ taḷadu jīyena lōka
vanantapāḷa nārāyaṇa vāvaṇa pramukhalakkaṇadēvaTheve is written below the line.nenippa nālvaru . Aṁtā nālvaroḷ vi
krāntadhanaṁjayananantapāḷaṁ nijabhūkāntanemayoḷu negarddaṁ kuntaḷanarapāḷa rājyabhara
dhaurēya . Ā viprakuḷōttamana ma lakṣmidēvi vāgdēvi jayaśrīdēvi yeni
si negarddu mahādēvi mahāvibhū vadhugaṁ vibhugaviḷādēvakuḷō
ttamarenippa sutarudiyi nā vāvaṇa gōvindadēva vesaresa
vinaga . © Antā vipravaṁsōtta galuṁ nijapratāpamentendaḍe .
nilisaṁ peṁcegiśaṁnacaṁnniyoḷatu ntaṁ vikramāṁkaṁ besasale na
ladaṁ kēḷdu kāḷiṁgarāyataleyaṁ kāla ya nāgirddanendande mirkkā kaliballā
ḷappanantaṁgabi doḷavade bennīvudāścaryya dadinanantapāḷavibhu dōrvvaḷavi
kra masavyasāciyeṁbuda nida nāve pēḷadoḍe bēgiyanuppina kaṭṭiyaṁ bisuṭṭō
ḍida naṁbikaṁbivaragaṁbiṟutōḍi nagarttegeṭṭa dōrmmadavaḷidirdda cōḷikare pēḷare sāhasaṁgaḷa .
Ēḷida daṇḍanāyakaranē vesavoddape cōḷarājyanirmmūḷana (.) naṁdhramaṇḍaḷikamasta
kaśūḷana . cakrakūṭasaṁcāḷana gūrjarapraḷeyakāḷana (.) naggadananta
pāḷanēṁ pēḷa caḷukyakuntaḷanarēṁdra mahēśvaranaṁkakārana .
Digital edition of SII 6.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
